business_name: The Fortitude Educational and Cultural Development Center
founded_note: Celebrated 25 years of service at the 2024 Pinnacle Awards Luncheon
brand_angle: Fortitude builds whole children and whole seniors across metro Atlanta — a brand as resilient as the families it lifts.
tagline: Empowering whole children and whole seniors across metro Atlanta — through public service.

verified_facts.mission: To provide accessible locations for public service activities in the metropolitan Atlanta communities for youth and adults.
verified_facts.youth_focus: Youth initiatives focusing on scholarship, financial literacy, health, and personal development.
verified_facts.senior_focus: Programs tailored to the educational and physical needs of an aging population, particularly senior citizens — including retirement information related to housing, Social Security, and overall financial literacy.
verified_facts.geographic_focus: Concentrates efforts in metro-Atlanta areas with limited resources.

services.title: Youth Scholarship & Development
services.desc: Scholarship support and youth programming centered on financial literacy, health, and personal development — helping metro-Atlanta students build the skills and resources to thrive.

services.title: Senior Empowerment Programs
services.desc: Education for seniors on retirement, Social Security, housing, and financial literacy — meeting the educational and physical needs of an aging population with dignity.

services.title: Pinnacle Leadership Awards & Community Philanthropy
services.desc: Our annual Pinnacle Leadership Awards and donor-engagement initiatives fund public-service activities in resource-limited communities across metropolitan Atlanta.

verification_notes: Reviews intentionally empty — no public ratings found for this nonprofit. Scholarship dollar amounts and specific high-school names (Creekside/Tri-Cities) from the lead packet could NOT be independently verified as FECDC's own program and were therefore NOT published; service copy uses the organization's own verified program language. Contact email corrected to info@fecdc.com per the org's about page. Phone (404) 578-2532 carried from lead data; not found on the live site.
